import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)])

    def find_obj(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # State info
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_cnt_s = find_obj(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, _ = find_obj(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    # Next state info
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_cnt_n = find_obj(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, _ = find_obj(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    # Front cell of agent in next state
    dir_n = next_state.agent.direction
    front_dy_n = DIRECTIONS[dir_n, 0].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_dx_n = DIRECTIONS[dir_n, 1].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_y_n = ay_n + front_dy_n
    front_x_n = ax_n + front_dx_n

    # Front cell of agent in current state
    dir_s = state.agent.direction
    front_dy_s = DIRECTIONS[dir_s, 0].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_dx_s = DIRECTIONS[dir_s, 1].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_y_s = ay_s + front_dy_s
    front_x_s = ax_s + front_dx_s

    just_picked = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_placed = holding_s & (~holding_n)
    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_cnt_n > 0.5
    pyr_on_grid_s = pyr_cnt_s > 0.5

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # Success: pyramid on grid, not held, adjacent to square
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    success = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)

    # ---- POTENTIAL FUNCTION ----
    # Define potential phi(state) that captures progress toward goal
    # Phase 1 (not holding): minimize dist(agent, pyramid)
    # Phase 2 (holding): minimize dist(front_cell, adjacent_to_square)
    #   i.e., we want front_cell to be at distance 1 from square
    #   so minimize |dist(front_cell, square) - 1|
    # Phase 3 (placed adjacent): done

    dist_ap_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - pyr_x_s)
    dist_ap_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - pyr_x_n)

    # When holding, want front cell to be at dist 1 from square
    dist_front_sq_s = jnp.abs(front_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(front_x_s - sq_x_s)
    dist_front_sq_n = jnp.abs(front_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(front_x_n - sq_x_n)
    # Error: how far front_cell is from being adjacent (dist=1) to square
    err_s = jnp.abs(dist_front_sq_s - 1.0)
    err_n = jnp.abs(dist_front_sq_n - 1.0)

    # Phase 1 reward: approach pyramid when not holding
    not_holding_both = (~holding_s) & (~holding_n)
    r_phase1 = not_holding_both.astype(jnp.float32) * (dist_ap_s - dist_ap_n) / max_dist * 5.0

    # Pickup bonus
    r_pickup = just_picked.astype(jnp.float32) * 2.0

    # Phase 2 reward: position front cell adjacent to square while holding
    holding_both = holding_s & holding_n
    r_phase2 = holding_both.astype(jnp.float32) * (err_s - err_n) / max_dist * 5.0

    # Also add absolute reward for being close to square when holding
    # to help from far away
    dist_as_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - sq_x_n)
    dist_as_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - sq_x_s)
    r_approach_sq_abs = holding_both.astype(jnp.float32) * (dist_as_s - dist_as_n) / max_dist * 3.0

    # Putdown reward: based on where pyramid lands
    placed_adjacent = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    placed_close = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 1.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 3.0)
    placed_far = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 3.0)

    r_putdown = (
        placed_adjacent.astype(jnp.float32) * 10.0
        + placed_close.astype(jnp.float32) * 0.5
        + placed_far.astype(jnp.float32) * (-1.0)
    )

    # Success reward
    r_success = success.astype(jnp.float32) * 20.0

    # Persistent reward when pyramid is already placed adjacent
    dist_pyr_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)
    already_adjacent = (
        (~holding_s) & (~holding_n) & pyr_on_grid_s & pyr_on_grid_n
        & (dist_pyr_sq_s >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_s <= 1.5)
    )
    r_persistent = already_adjacent.astype(jnp.float32) * 5.0

    total = (
        r_phase1
        + r_pickup
        + r_phase2
        + r_approach_sq_abs
        + r_putdown
        + r_success
        + r_persistent
    )

    return total.astype(jnp.float32)
